data.title: PEPE price may consolidate at $0.000005 before potential 35% rally to $0.0000097 medium-term.
data.description: The forecast for PEPE price suggests a potential increase to $0.0000097 in the medium term, provided crucial support levels are maintained. In the short term, a consolidation around $0.000005 is anticipated over the coming weeks. Investors are advised to stay informed for further updates.

data.title: Forecast for December 2025: ALGO aiming for $0.16-0.19 recovery, could see 33-58% increase from current $0.12 support level.
data.description: A forecast for ALGO's price suggests a potential increase of 33-58% to reach a range between $0.16 and $0.19, even amidst the current bearish trend. The critical support level at $0.12 will play a crucial role in determining the future direction of the price.

data.title: SUI price may rise by 25-49% towards $1.70-$2.40 range after breakout signals recovery.
data.description: According to analysts, there is a potential upside of 25-49% in the price prediction for SUI. The target range set by analysts is between $1.70 to $2.40 after the breakout from a falling wedge pattern and improving momentum indicators.

data.title: Dow Jones and Russell 2000 reach new highs while AI stocks drop. Tesla and Eli Lilly in buy zones amid market rally.
data.description: Last week, bearish market trends affected the AI sector, contrasting with the Dow Jones and Russell 2000 reaching record highs. Stocks of Tesla and Eli Lilly are currently positioned for purchase. The latest market insights indicate a divided rally, posing a question on the next steps for investors. Tesla and Eli Lilly are currently highlighted as prime purchase opportunities in this evolving market landscape.

data.title: Trade pledge between U.S. and U.K. paused due to disputes over technology and food safety regulations.
data.description: The trade pledge between the U.S. government and Britain, focusing on technology, has been halted due to disagreements over Britain's digital regulations and food safety rules. This pause reflects broader tensions in the trade relationship between the two countries, with significant implications for bilateral trade agreements.

data.title: NEAR's price may hit $1.85 by Jan 2026. Analysts forecast $1.76-$2.25, with $1.66 near Bollinger Band support, suggesting 11-35% upside potential.
data.description: The NEAR Protocol is currently exhibiting a bullish MACD momentum, with financial analysts setting a target range of $1.76 to $2.25. At its current price of $1.66, it is positioned close to Bollinger Band support levels, indicating a potential 11-35% upward movement.

data.description: ATOM price is forecasted to potentially increase to $2.32 in the next 2 weeks, with a target of $2.75 in 4-6 weeks if the critical support level of $2.14 is maintained. The predictions are based on mixed signals in the market.

data.title: AVAX predicted to reach $15.50 in 4 weeks with bullish momentum; key resistance at $15.27 could trigger breakout.

data.title: SOL price may surge to $140-145 in 2 weeks, with strong technical momentum and oversold conditions near $130 support level.
data.description: There is a positive outlook for SOL's price with a predicted rally to $140-145 expected in the next two weeks. This is backed by a bullish MACD histogram and oversold conditions close to the critical $130 support mark.

data.title: Unused plastic film can be transformed into fuel, with PP and PE film making up 50% of light materials in construction and demolition waste.
data.description: In Hangzhou, China, on December 13, 2025, it was reported that discarded plastic film can be transformed into fuel, creating a valuable resource from what was once considered waste. In construction and demolition waste, there are hundreds of millions of tons of light materials, out of which PP and PE film make up around 50%. This innovative process could potentially help reduce environmental impact and utilize valuable resources efficiently.

data.title: Phinge CEO Robert DeMaio ranked #1 by Crunchbase globally and in at least 40 categories including "AI Companies (Top 10K)".
data.description: In Incline Village, Nevada on December 13, 2025, Phinge celebrated its Founder and CEO Robert DeMaio for achieving the top global ranking on Crunchbase. He was ranked #1 in more than 40 categories, such as "Artificial Intelligence (AI) Companies (Top 10K)." The recognition highlights DeMaio's success in a diverse range of areas within the industry.

data.title: Bitcoin is expected to consolidate around $90K before potentially reaching $100K by year-end. $87K is crucial support level.
data.description: An analysis of the current BTC price forecasts a period of consolidation at approximately $90,000 before a potential surge to over $100,000 by the end of the year. The crucial support level to watch is at $87,000, as it will likely dictate the direction of the next significant market movement.
This budget was about discipline, not growth. Markets rewarded fiscal responsibility with lower gilt yields and a stronger pound. The question is how long discipline holds up without stimulus.

data.title: 2025 Pearl Bay Climate Investment and Financing Conference in Guangzhou concludes successfully with fruitful achievements.
data.description: On December 13, 2025, the 2025 Pearl Bay Climate Investment and Financing Conference wrapped up in Nansha District, Guangzhou, China. This event, held in the capital of Guangdong Province in south China, resulted in significant accomplishments. With the theme "Green GBA, Smart Future," the conference showcased the importance of sustainable investments in the Greater Bay Area.

data.title: International experts from Spain and Brazil discuss global cooperation in the blue economy and sustainable finance at 2025 Pearl Bay Climate Investment and Financing Conference in Nansha, Beijing.
data.description: On December 13, 2025, experts and scholars from Spain and Brazil shared their perspectives on enhancing international collaboration in the blue economy and sustainable finance during a sub-forum of the 2025 Pearl Bay Climate Investment and Financing Conference in Nansha. This event aimed to address crucial issues related to climate investment and financing. The discussions focused on strategies to promote sustainable practices and investments in marine sectors while also emphasizing the importance of financial mechanisms that support environmental conservation efforts. The conference attracted a significant audience, with participation from numerous industry professionals, academics, and policymakers. The insights shared at the event underscored the growing recognition of the need for global cooperation in advancing sustainable development goals, particularly in the context of climate change and environmental sustainability.

data.title: In first Nasdaq 100 reshuffle since joining, strategy stays amid MSCI review on excluding firms with over 50% crypto holdings.
data.description: MSCI is currently reviewing the possibility of excluding companies from the Nasdaq 100 index if their cryptocurrency holdings make up more than half (50%) of their overall assets. This strategic move is being considered to potentially reduce risks associated with highly volatile crypto investments. It emphasizes the importance of maintaining a diversified investment portfolio within the Nasdaq 100.

data.title: UAE Automotive Spare Parts E-Commerce Market is valued at USD 1.2 billion, experiencing robust growth due to online shopping surge.
data.description: A report on the UAE Automotive Spare Parts E-Commerce Market predicts significant growth from 2025 to 2030. With a current value of USD 1.2 billion, this market is thriving due to increased online shopping, higher vehicle ownership, and the demand for affordable options. The ease and efficiency offered by e-commerce platforms are driving this expansion, presenting ample opportunities for businesses in this sector.
